generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor detecting occupancy patterns in building spaces, integrated into BIM model with metadata (tenant ID, device ID, endpoint addresses) for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring indoor temperature, integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data transmission via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring indoor humidity levels, integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Automation System (BAS) device measuring energy consumption, integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data transmission via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

instance DaylightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring daylight levels, integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DaylightDataStream
]

instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized IoT sensor collecting post-occupancy data for iterative refinement of control policies in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream normalized via Eclipse Hono and ingested into Eclipse Ditto for digital twin state representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream normalized via Eclipse Hono and ingested into Eclipse Ditto for digital twin state representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data stream normalized via Eclipse Hono and ingested into Eclipse Ditto for digital twin state representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data stream normalized via Eclipse Hono and ingested into Eclipse Ditto for digital twin state representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance DaylightDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time daylight data stream normalized via Eclipse Hono and ingested into Eclipse Ditto for digital twin state representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DaylightSensor
]

instance PostOccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy data stream used for iterative refinement of control policies in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) component for lighting control, configured to execute reinforcement learning-based policies (BOREALIS) or predefined control strategies (TwinLight)."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) component for HVAC control, configured to execute reinforcement learning-based policies (BOREALIS) or predefined control strategies (TwinLight)."
]

instance AdaptiveShadingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) component for adaptive shading control, configured to execute control logic via bidirectional communication with Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model semantically enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator IDs, control logic) for model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RealTimeDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time operational data from IoT sensors and BAS devices, normalized via Eclipse Hono and stored in Eclipse Ditto for digital twin state representation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream, TemperatureDataStream, HumidityDataStream, EnergyConsumptionDataStream, DaylightDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicy : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based control policy (BOREALIS) embedded within the DT for adaptive decision-making in energy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RuleBasedControlStrategy : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Rule-based control strategy (TwinLight) embedded within the DT for predefined automation in energy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization model rendered via Unreal Engine 5, synchronized with physical data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool automating extraction of domain semantics from BIM and generating runtime interfaces (Hono/Ditto configurations) via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, CustomServiceIntegration
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for IoT data ingestion and normalization, enabling real-time bidirectional communication with physical assets."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin state management platform storing normalized sensor data and enabling synchronized state updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization engine providing interactive 3D monitoring and simulation interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service via Unreal Engine 5 for immersive facility management, displaying real-time energy consumption trends, occupancy patterns, and environmental comfort metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, OccupancyPatternInsight, EnvironmentalComfortInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing reinforcement learning-based control policies (BOREALIS) or rule-based automation (TwinLight) to optimize energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedControlPolicyAction, EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling digital twin entanglement evaluation (ODTE metric) and model-driven 'what-if' analyses for scenario testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationFidelityInsight, ScenarioTestingAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service integration platform allowing DT Engineers to develop plugins (e.g., energy dashboards, predictive maintenance tools) for domain-specific needs."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomPluginIntegrationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard displaying energy consumption trends for facility management decision support."
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard displaying occupancy patterns for space utilization optimization."
]

instance EnvironmentalComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard displaying environmental comfort metrics (temperature, humidity, daylight) for occupant well-being assessment."
]

instance OptimizedControlPolicyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of optimized control policies balancing energy use, visual comfort, and health effects via reinforcement learning (BOREALIS)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output identifying energy optimization opportunities based on real-time and historical data."
]

instance SynchronizationFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation of digital twin entanglement (ODTE metric) measuring synchronization fidelity post-deployment."
]

instance ScenarioTestingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of model-driven 'what-if' analyses for scenario testing and validation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CustomPluginIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Integration of custom plugins (e.g., energy dashboards, predictive maintenance tools) via standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Twinning Process and DT Evolution
instance ModelingPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Phase where BIM models are enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) and validated for digital twin deployment."
]

instance DeploymentPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Phase involving automated generation of runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations) via model-driven transformations, reducing manual effort."
]

instance OperationPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Phase enabling real-time synchronization with Eclipse Hono/Ditto for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual twins."
]

instance EvolutionPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Phase allowing runtime configuration management for updates (e.g., new sensors, control policies) without full redeployment."
]

instance OverallDigitalTwinEntanglementMetric : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Metric evaluating synchronization fidelity post-deployment to ensure accurate digital twin representation."
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ModelingPhase, DeploymentPhase, OperationPhase, EvolutionPhase
    base:desc "Digital Twin lifecycle environment supporting modeling, deployment, operation, and evolution phases with real-time synchronization capabilities."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world involve **control commands and actuation signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the physical system. This includes:
  - **Automated control logic execution** (e.g., adaptive lighting adjustments in BOREALIS or predefined control strategies in TwinLight) sent via middleware to **actuators and controllers** in the BCS.
  - **Real-time adjustments** to building operations (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting schedules) based on DT analytics or user inputs from **Facility Managers**.
  - **Bidirectional synchronization** ensured by **Eclipse Hono** (for data exchange) and **Ditto** (for digital twin state management), enabling closed-loop control systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale includes:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Continuous bidirectional data exchange between physical assets and the DT, with latency minimized via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** middleware.
  - **Operational time scales**: Services like adaptive lighting control (BOREALIS) operate at **sub-second to minute-level granularity**, while predictive analytics may run at **hourly or daily intervals**.
  - **Life-cycle phases**: The DT supports **long-term entanglement** (e.g., decades-long building operations) with periodic updates to reflect physical changes (e.g., refurbishments)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: Semantic backbone for spatial and functional data.
  - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for real-time data exchange and digital twin state synchronization.
  - **Control Layer**: Embedded control logic (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) for adaptive operations.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for interactive monitoring.
  - **Extension Layer**: Custom services integrated via **standardized extension points** for scalability and future-proofing."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following life-cycle stages of the physical counterpart:
  - **Design phase**: Static BIM models serve as the foundation, enriched with **runtime metadata** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations).
  - **Construction phase**: Real-time synchronization begins with **device commissioning** and integration into the BCS.
  - **Operation phase**: Full DT functionality is deployed, supporting **predictive maintenance, energy optimization, and adaptive control** throughout the building’s operational life.
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: The DT evolves with physical changes via **runtime configuration management**, allowing updates without full redeployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart, validating synchronization accuracy.
  - **Model validation**: BIM models are validated to ensure **semantic consistency** before runtime artifact generation.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Sensor data normalization (via Hono) and **control policy refinement** (via BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning) mitigate errors in real-time synchronization.
  - **Verification and validation (V&V)**: Continuous monitoring of **data integrity** and **control logic correctness** via middleware and visualization tools."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Network protocols**: **MQTT** (via Eclipse Hono) for lightweight IoT data exchange and **HTTP/REST** for Ditto-based digital twin state management.
  - **Architecture**: **Service-oriented middleware** (Hono/Ditto) decouples physical sensors from the DT, enabling **scalable and modular integration**.
  - **Data flow**: Sensor data → **Hono** (normalization) → **Ditto** (digital twin state) → **Unreal Engine** (visualization) → **Actuators** (control commands)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed using:
  - **Cloud/edge infrastructure**: Middleware (Hono/Ditto) can be deployed on **cloud platforms** (e.g., AWS, Azure) or **edge devices** for low-latency operations.
  - **Automated deployment pipeline**: Model-driven transformations generate **deployable artifacts** (e.g., Docker containers for Hono/Ditto) with minimal manual intervention.
  - **Modular services**: Custom plugins are integrated via **standardized extension points**, allowing **scalable deployment** across building systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration involves:
  - **External information systems**: The DT can exchange data with **ERP systems**, **CMMS platforms**, or **city-wide IoT networks** via standardized APIs.
  - **Interoperability frameworks**: Compliance with **BIM standards** (e.g., IFC) and **IoT protocols** (e.g., MQTT) ensures seamless integration with third-party tools.
  - **Modular services**: Custom plugins can interface with **external data sources** (e.g., weather APIs, utility grids) for enhanced decision-making."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **BIM standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for semantic interoperability and **COBie** for facility data exchange.
  - **IoT standards**: **MQTT** (via Eclipse Hono) for sensor data and **OPC UA** (compatible with Ditto) for industrial interoperability.
  - **Middleware standards**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** comply with **OSGi** and **Eclipse IoT** frameworks for modularity and scalability."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Middleware security**: **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** support **authentication (OAuth2)**, **encryption (TLS)**, and **access control** for secure data exchange.
  - **Operational safety**: Control logic (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) includes **safety constraints** to prevent hazardous commands (e.g., extreme HVAC setpoints).
  - **Validation mechanisms**: **Model validation** and **ODTE metric** ensure the DT remains synchronized with the physical system, reducing risks of misaligned operations."
]
